message:
🌱 Add kcp to ADOPTERS.md (#4644)

* 🌱 Add kcp to ADOPTERS.md

Add kcp as an adopter of KubeStellar Console with guided install
mission and engagement from kcp maintainer @mjudeikis in
kcp-dev/kcp#3923.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* Remove author mention from kcp adopter entry

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -12,3 +12,4 @@ Listed below are organizations that have adopted, or benefitted from, KubeStella
 | Cadence | Guided install mission for Cadence Workflow via KubeStellar Console for the non-CNCF open source Cadence project, with engagement from Cadence maintainers @shijiesheng and @demirkayaender in [cadence-workflow/cadence#7830](https://github.com/cadence-workflow/cadence/issues/7830) | N/A | [Cadence](https://cadenceworkflow.io) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-cadence-workflow) |
 | Easegress | Guided install mission for Easegress via KubeStellar Console, with engagement from Easegress maintainers in [easegress-io/easegress#1510](https://github.com/easegress-io/easegress/issues/1510) | Sandbox | [Easegress](https://github.com/easegress-io/easegress) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-easegress) |
 | Microcks | Guided install mission for Microcks via KubeStellar Console, with install recipe contributed to the Microcks community repo ([microcks/community#125](https://github.com/microcks/community/pull/125)) and endorsed by Microcks co-founder @yada in [microcks/microcks#1997](https://github.com/microcks/microcks/issues/1997) | Sandbox | [Microcks](https://microcks.io) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-microcks) |
+| kcp | Guided install mission for kcp via KubeStellar Console, with engagement from kcp maintainers in [kcp-dev/kcp#3923](https://github.com/kcp-dev/kcp/issues/3923) | Sandbox | [kcp](https://kcp.io) · [Install Mission](https://console.kubestellar.io/missions/install-kcp) |
